form.title: Title
form.titleMaxLength: Title must be 100 characters or less
form.messageMaxLength: Message must be 500 characters or less
form.priorityTooltip: Set the priority level to help recipients understand urgency
form.selectRecipientsRequired: Please select at least one recipient (role, user, branch, department, or province).
form.selectRolesRequired: Please select at least one role
form.typeTooltip: Select the type of notification to help recipients understand its importance.
form.titleTooltip: Enter a clear, concise title that summarizes the notification content.
form.messageTooltip: Enter the detailed notification message that recipients will see.
form.selectRolesTooltip: Select one or more roles to notify. Users with these roles will receive the notification.
form.selectUsersTooltip: Select specific users to notify individually.
form.selectBranchTooltip: Select a branch to notify all users in that branch.
form.selectDepartmentTooltip: Select a department to notify all users in that department.
form.selectProvinceTooltip: Select a province to notify all users in that province.
form.deliveryOptionsTooltip: Choose how to deliver the notification - in-app only or include push notifications.
form.deliveryOptionsRequired: Please select at least one delivery method.
form.noRecipientsDesc: The current selection doesn't match any users. Please check your recipient criteria.
form.sendSuccessDesc: Your notification has been delivered to {{count}} recipient(s).
form.sendErrorDesc: There was an error sending the notification. Please try again.

settings.title: Notification Settings
settings.pushNotificationsDesc: Receive push notifications on this device
settings.pushNotificationsHelp: Enable push notifications to receive real-time alerts even when the app is closed
settings.frequencyDesc: How often you want to receive notifications
settings.typesDesc: Choose which types of notifications you want to receive
settings.permissionRequiredDesc: Please enable notifications in your browser settings to receive push notifications.

success.preferencesUpdated: Your notification preferences have been updated

title: Notifications
adminMessage: User {{name}} ({{email}}) has registered and is awaiting approval.
userDescription: Your registration has been approved. Your role is {{role}}.
userRejectedDescription: Your registration has been rejected. Please contact support if you have any questions.
adminRejectedDescription: A user registration has been rejected by an administrator.
roleUpdatedDescription: Your role has been updated to {{role}}

errors.markAllAsRead: Failed to mark all notifications as read
